title: Codex CLI v0.111.0 Release
description: OpenAI released Codex CLI v0.111.0 on March 5, 2026, with distributions available for macOS (aarch64), Windows (aarch64, x86_64), and Linux (aarch64-gnu, aarch64-musl). The release includes the codex-npm package version 0.111.0 and command runner component with strong adoption metrics showing 563+ downloads for the core binary.

title: Continue v1.5.45 CLI Release
description: Continue released v1.5.45 on March 4, 2026, featuring updates to the running-locally documentation workflow section. The release replaced the check CLI with /check skill and updated the primary local path to use the /check skill installed via npx skills add. Co-authored by Claude Opus 4.6.

title: Aider Model Support Expansion
description: Aider received updates on March 3, 2026 adding support for multiple new AI models including Claude 4.5/4.6 (sonnet/haiku/opus), Gemini 2.5 Flash and Flash-Lite, Gemini 3 preview models, and DeepSeek Reasoner. The repo map now supports Fortran, Haskell, Julia, and Zig, with compatibility updates for newer tree-sitter Python APIs.

title: Continue v1.5.44 CLI Release
description: Continue released v1.5.44 on March 2, 2026 as a CLI release built from the main branch, continuing active development on the AI coding assistant extension.
